markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Spain vs Argentina professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 19, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Louis Wessels wins the Pohjola vs Wessels professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Tampere Qualification Final after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The following market refers to the Pohjola vs Wessels professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Tampere Qualification Final after a ball has been played.
